sections.title: Fats
sections.narration: 0.1g of fat. omega 3 is doing a lot of the work here. for a tuber, the cleanest win is a more stable carb profile.
sections.subtitleText: 0.1g of fat. omega 3 is doing a lot of the work here. for a tuber, the cleanest win is a more stable carb profile.

sections.title: Carbs
sections.narration: 20.1g of carbs. fibre is doing a lot of the work here. for tubers, the carb side decides whether the food feels stable or flimsy.
sections.subtitleText: 20.1g of carbs. fibre is doing a lot of the work here. for tubers, the carb side decides whether the food feels stable or flimsy.

sections.title: Proteins
sections.narration: 1.6g of protein. bioavailability is one of the best parts of the protein story. protein is usually limited here, so the other sections have to carry more.
sections.subtitleText: 1.6g of protein. bioavailability is one of the best parts of the protein story. protein is usually limited here, so the other sections have to carry more.

sections.title: Vitamins
sections.narration: vitamin a at 160% daily value stands out most. that is major vitamin support.
sections.subtitleText: vitamin a at 160% daily value stands out most. that is major vitamin support.

sections.title: Minerals
sections.narration: potassium at 10% daily value stands out most. useful, but still pretty limited.
sections.subtitleText: potassium at 10% daily value stands out most. useful, but still pretty limited.

sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: on the plus side: carotenoid content gives it extra value because that adds a useful plant-pigment angle beyond the basic carb role most tubers play. fairly filling for the calories because a practical strength for an energy food. easy to use as a wholefood staple because works cleanly in meals without needing much rescue from toppings or processing.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: the drawbacks next: naturally sweeter than some tubers because still fine, but it is not the lowest-sugar energy food in the category. healthiness depends on preparation because heavy added fats or sugary toppings can change the practical outcome. protein contribution is light because like most tubers, it is not doing much in the protein lane.

closing.summary: Sweet Potato has a genuinely strong overall case. the practical downsides are real, but they do not outweigh the upside. best when you want practical carbs and the rest of the profile is still reasonably clean.
closing.useCaseNote: Best when you want practical carbs and the rest of the profile is still reasonably clean.
